data.title: Former software developer gets 4-year sentence for disrupting company's network with malicious code in 2019.
data.description: According to prosecutors, in 2019, a former software developer at Eaton Corporation created and implemented malicious code that caused servers on the company's network to crash.

data.title: Dow Jones jumps 800 points as Powell hints at rate cut; Nvidia earnings anticipated. All-time high.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index reached a record high, surging by 800 points amidst growing optimism regarding a potential rate cut at the upcoming September Federal Reserve meeting. This significant leap in the stock market was influenced by positive remarks from Powell, further fueling expectations for a decrease in interest rates. Additionally, there is anticipation surrounding Nvidia earnings which could impact market trends.

data.title: Stock market rallies to new highs post dovish Powell speech, S&P 500 and Dow Jones surge. Nvidia earnings awaited.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell's optimistic remarks sparked a significant surge on Friday, leading to record highs for both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones indices. Additionally, a number of stocks indicated advantageous buying opportunities. The impending Nvidia earnings announcement is eagerly anticipated. The market rally in response to Powell's comments suggests a positive outlook for investors, with the Dow Jones Futures trending towards higher levels.

data.title: Mustang Energy completes sampling program at Surprise Creek Project, Saskatchewan. Acquired 80% interest from Thunderbird Resources.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on August 22, 2025, Mustang Energy Corp. (CSE: MEC, OTC:MECPF, FRA:92T) announced the successful completion of the initial phase of field exploration on the Surprise Creek Uranium-Copper Project in a promising area northwest of the Athabasca Basin. The company has secured an 80% interest in the Project through an option agreement with Thunderbird Resources Ltd. More information on this agreement can be found in the Company's press releases from June 4, 2025, and June 16, 2025, available on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile.

data.title: Tige Boats introduces redesigned RZX Class for 2026 - 24RZX and 22RZX surf boats, bigger and more luxurious.
data.description: An exciting update comes from Abilene, Texas as Tige Boats, Inc. reveals the innovative RZX Class for 2026, marking a significant shift for the brand. The 24RZX and 22RZX surf boats are the stars of this redesign, boasting a blend of spaciousness and opulence. This revamped class promises enhanced features, set to elevate the boating experience. Get ready to experience luxury like never before with the all-new RZX Class from Tige Boats, Inc.

data.title: Metalsource secures $50,000 loan at 5% interest, issues 25,000 warrants at $0.20 per share to lender.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on August 22, 2025, MetalSource Mining Inc. (referred to as "Metalsource" or the "Company") disclosed that it has finalized a loan agreement with a third party at arm’s length, referred to as the “Lender”. As per the agreement, Metalsource will be borrowing $50,000 from the Lender with an annual interest rate set at 5%. Furthermore, in addition to the loan, the Company will also be granting the Lender 25,000 warrants, allowing them to purchase shares at $0.20 each over a 2-year period. The Company's shares trade on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the ticker symbol "MSM".

data.title: VanEck to start ETF with Jito's Solana tokens post regulator's approval on liquid staking not being a securities transaction.
data.description: The filing of the VanEck JitoSOL ETF follows a recent regulatory decision stating that liquid staking does not constitute a securities transaction. This development occurred earlier this month and is significant in the growing landscape of digital assets.

data.title: A women-owned organization educates about legal action for sexual abuse by coach Sean Gardner, arrested for child pornography.
data.description: In Dallas, A Case for Women LLC, a women-owned organization, is raising concerns about former gymnastics coach Sean Gardner. The AP has reported Gardner was arrested by the FBI in August 2025 for a federal child pornography charge. Prior to this, Gardner had been suspended from coaching gymnastics at Chow’s Gymnastics and Dance Institute. A Case for Women LLC aims to educate women and families on accessing contingency fee civil legal services. The organization is highlighting Gardner's case to emphasize the importance of legal awareness.

data.title: FL Southern College named among top 391 colleges by Princeton Review, labeled "Best in the South."
data.description: In its annual ranking, The Princeton Review's The Best 391 Colleges has recognized Florida Southern College in Lakeland, Florida as one of the top universities nationwide, specifically highlighting it as one of the "Best in the South". This prestigious accolade underscores the institution's academic excellence and student-focused environment. With a strong faculty and dedicated career services, Florida Southern College continues to stand out among its peers.

data.title: Kodiak Gas Services (NYSE: KGS) offers 2024 tax packages for CSI Compressco LP online for former unitholders.
data.description: Today, Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. (NYSE: KGS) released the 2024 Schedule K-3 investor tax documents pertaining to former CSI Compressco LP unitholders. These documents contain important international tax information. The tax packages are accessible online through the K-1 Tax Package Support website at www.taxpackagesupport.com/compressco. Kodiak acquired CSI Compressco on April 1.

data.title: Koch Equity Development buys GCH Technologies Inc. to boost wireless innovation. Acquisition made on Aug 22, 2025.
data.description: Koch Equity Development LLC (KED), the investment arm of Koch, Inc., revealed on August 22, 2025, its acquisition aimed to enhance solutions for the messaging ecosystem and boost wireless innovation in Wichita, Kansas. This move will aid GCH in speeding up its services while driving new developments in the wireless sector. This strategic acquisition comes as part of KED's efforts to expand its portfolio and ensure growth in the tech industry.
